old_value: {"id":"voidlock-h3cwe","title":"Bug: Campaign map connection lines invisible (canvas can't resolve CSS vars)","description":"drawConnections() in CampaignScreen.ts uses CSS variables (var(--color-text-dim), var(--color-primary)) as canvas strokeStyle, but canvas context doesn't resolve CSS variables. Only the hardcoded #FFFFFF path renders. Need to resolve CSS vars via getComputedStyle before passing to canvas.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"git@kamyk.me","created_at":"2026-03-27T14:53:47Z","created_by":"Roman Kamyk","updated_at":"2026-03-27T14:53:47Z"}

new_value: Code fix verified, 15 tests passed and linting successful.

old_value: {"id":"voidlock-fxlcc","title":"Bug: Campaign progression stuck after first mission win","description":"After winning the first mission, connected nodes in the next rank are not becoming Accessible, preventing the player from continuing. Need to investigate whether reconcileMission/advanceNode flow properly promotes connected nodes from Hidden to Accessible in the live app. The currentNodeId guard in reconcileMission may be involved.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"git@kamyk.me","created_at":"2026-03-27T03:14:40Z","created_by":"Roman Kamyk","updated_at":"2026-03-27T03:14:40Z"}

new_value: Root cause confirmed and fixed. 1. Engine: CampaignManager.reconcileMission now robustly uses result.nodeId if currentNodeId is null. 2. UI: NavigationOrchestrator now explicitly calls selectNode on selection. Verified with reproduction test and existing suites.

old_value: {"id":"voidlock-ths5v","title":"Bug: Sector map displays top-to-bottom instead of left-to-right","description":"SectorMapGenerator.ts assigns node positions with rank mapped to Y-axis and lane to X-axis, resulting in vertical layout instead of left-to-right progression. The position calculation at line 73-76 has x/y swapped: x uses (nodeCount+1) divisor (lane) while y uses (layers+1) divisor (rank). Should be the reverse.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"git@kamyk.me","created_at":"2026-03-27T03:14:37Z","created_by":"Roman Kamyk","updated_at":"2026-03-27T03:14:37Z"}

new_value: SectorMapGenerator.ts was found to be already using rank for X and lane for Y (left-to-right layout). Added a regression test tests/engine/generators/SectorMapGenerator_Repro_THS5V.test.ts to ensure this orientation is preserved.

Added comprehensive tests in tests/engine/generators/SectorMapGenerator_Repro_THS5V.test.ts and tests/engine/managers/CampaignProgression.test.ts. These verify that map orientation is left-to-right and that nodes correctly transition from Hidden to Accessible after mission victory, including skipping logic.

old_value: {"id":"voidlock-uznvj","title":"Bug: Campaign map node contrast too low for hidden/default nodes","description":"Default .campaign-node has color: var(--color-text-dim) (#666) and border: 1px solid var(--color-border-strong) (#444) on dark background (rgba(0,0,0,0.8)). Fails WCAG contrast requirements. Hidden nodes need higher contrast borders/icons.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"git@kamyk.me","created_at":"2026-03-27T14:53:46Z","created_by":"Roman Kamyk","updated_at":"2026-03-27T14:53:46Z"}

new_value: Updated src/styles/main.css to increase contrast for default (Hidden), Revealed, and Skipped nodes on the campaign map. Used var(--color-text-muted) and var(--color-text-dim) to ensure icons and borders are clearly visible against the dark background.

old_value: {"id":"voidlock-1xhhf","title":"i18n: Create core module (index.ts, keys.ts)","description":"Create src/renderer/i18n/index.ts with t() lookup function and locale switching, and keys.ts with dot-namespaced string key constants. t(key) is synchronous, resolves from current locale. Per ADR 0060.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"git@kamyk.me","created_at":"2026-03-27T03:54:32Z","created_by":"Roman Kamyk","updated_at":"2026-03-27T03:54:32Z"}

new_value: Implemented the core i18n system as per ADR 0060. Created type-safe keys, translation lookup, and locale switching logic. Updated global configuration to persist locale selection. Verified with unit tests.
